text: - H.   For any non-state or federally required payroll deductions (such as loans, tools, insurance, child support, etc) you are required to complete and have the laborer or mechanic sign a Certified Payroll Deduction form (will be generated on our website when a deduction is entered) and submit to Oryx Compliance with the first payroll  in which the deduction is taken. One payroll deduction per employee is required and should be emailed or mailed to Oryx Compliance .  Please do not submit a payroll deduction with each certified payroll
